## Summary

A clear and concise description of the proposed addition or improvement.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the new document, standard, or process.

## Impact

Which repositories, specifications, or teams are affected?

## Related documents

Links to existing KB documents, ADRs, or specifications.
